name: Excalidraw
when_to_use: 需要用户自由画形状、箭头、文字并保留可读场景 JSON 的白板共创时用它而非手写 canvas,因为原生在自由绘制、变换手柄、框选、吸附和完整场景状态上失败。非做 AI 一次生成的静态示意图。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能生成静态 SVG/图片;默认完全做不到自由笔迹、对象框选与缩放旋转、连线绑定、多对象场景编辑和可继续回放的几何 JSON。

en.when_to_use: Use it for collaborative whiteboarding where users freely draw shapes, arrows, and text while retaining readable scene JSON instead of hand-writing a canvas. Native implementations fail on freehand drawing, transform handles, marquee selection, snapping, and complete scene state. It is not for a static diagram generated once by AI.
en.why_valuable: AI can only generate a static SVG or image by default. It cannot provide freehand strokes, object selection with scale and rotation, connector binding, multi-object scene editing, or reusable geometry JSON.

data_in.note: boot first uses upstream convertToExcalidrawElements to expand trimmed element skeletons into complete ExcalidrawElement objects, then passes them as initialData.elements. This is more reliable than requiring AI to fill internal fields such as seed/versionNonce. It covers only common shapes and text, not complete Excalidraw file import.

elements?.width?: number >= 0 - default 0 for shapes; provide explicitly for a visible shape
elements?.height?: number >= 0 - default 0 for shapes; provide explicitly for a visible shape
elements?.text?: string - required when type='text'; omitted by default for other types

schema.viewOnly?: boolean - whether the scene is read-only, default false

spec.note: Excalidraw fills the width and height of its parent. The parent defaults to height 520px; AI may override it with another explicit pixel value. Do not use vh or percentage heights (hard rule 3).

data_in.note: boot 先用上游 convertToExcalidrawElements 把裁剪后的 element skeleton 补成完整 ExcalidrawElement,再作为 initialData.elements 传给组件;这比要求 AI 手填 seed/versionNonce 等内部字段稳定。仅覆盖常用形状与文本,非做完整 Excalidraw 文件导入器。

elements?.width?: number >= 0 —— 图形默认 0;为可见图形应显式给出
elements?.height?: number >= 0 —— 图形默认 0;为可见图形应显式给出
elements?.text?: string —— type='text' 时必填,其他类型默认省略

schema.viewOnly?: boolean —— 是否只读查看,默认 false

spec.note: Excalidraw 自身占满父容器的宽高;父容器默认 height 520px,AI 可覆盖为其他明确像素值,禁用 vh/百分比高(铁律 3)。

example._why: 完整场景元素字段极深;使用官方 skeleton 转换器后仍需 type 与几何字段配对,minimal 用最小可见图形钉死输入。

uplink._note: 条目不绑定 onChange;消费 AI 需要结构回传时自行使用上游 onChange(elements, appState, files) 并按载体发送。
uplink.widget: 消费 AI 自行把当前 elements/appState/files 的裁剪 JSON 编入 sendPrompt 文案。
uplink.codex: 消费 AI 自行把当前场景 JSON 交给 sendFollowUpMessage。
uplink.artifact: artifact 无上行;优先使用 Excalidraw 内置 PNG/SVG 导出,需要结构时再提供 JSON 下载。

carriers.widget: conditional:React 根与 index.css 必须放入 shadowRoot,并允许 Excalidraw 默认字体 CDN;文件选择/全屏等宿主能力可能降级
carriers.codex: conditional:需 React/ReactDOM 19.2.5 与当前 jsDelivr +esm 内的 React peer 完全一致,并允许 CSS、canvas 与字体 CDN

boot_note: 保守校准:核对时 @excalidraw/excalidraw@0/+esm 固定引用 react@19.2.5,故 boot 同步钉住 React/ReactDOM 19.2.5;若 jsDelivr 重建后 peer 路径变化,三处版本必须一起改。

isolation.evidence: +esm grep: `createPortal` x1 + `document.body` x17 → dialogs/context-menus/tooltips portal to document.body and ESCAPE the shadow root (not mitigated by boot). `addEventListener('keydown')` x10, `pointermove` x6, `pointerup` x8, `resize` x1 → heavy global keyboard/pointer/resize listeners. Runtime CSS hint (`type='text/css'` + appendChild) plus 13 `excalidraw.com` refs → loads fonts/assets from an external CDN (CSP + font-src concern). Main React root + index.css work inside shadow, but portaled overlays + external fonts make it conditional; entry's 'conditional' widget/codex marking is correct.
